# Origin Direct Group

> Origin Direct Group is a B2B commodity trading company that sources agricultural and industrial commodities directly from producers in Ghana, Nigeria, and India. We eliminate middlemen, providing buyers worldwide with competitive pricing, full quality control, and soil-to-door logistics.

## Products
- [Shea Butter](/products/shea-butter): Unrefined, refined, and organic shea butter from Ghana. Cosmetic and food grade. COSMOS, ECOCERT, USDA Organic certified. MOQ: 1 FCL.
- [Cocoa](/products/cocoa): Cocoa beans, butter, powder, and nibs from Ghana and Nigeria. EUDR compliant with geolocation traceability. Rainforest Alliance certified.
- [Cashew Nuts](/products/cashew-nuts): Raw cashew nuts (RCN) and processed kernels (W180-W450) from Ghana and Nigeria. 43.8% of global in-shell exports.
- [Hookah Charcoal](/products/hookah-charcoal): Premium Nigerian hardwood charcoal briquettes. 85%+ fixed carbon, 90+ min burn time. Halal certified. OEM available.
- [Dried Hibiscus](/products/hibiscus): Sun-dried hibiscus flowers from Nigeria (world's largest producer). SENASICA compliant for Mexico trade.
- [Sesame Seeds](/products/sesame-seeds): Hulled and natural sesame seeds from Nigeria. Tahini grade, 48-55% oil content. EU ethylene oxide compliant.
- [Moringa Powder](/products/moringa): Organic moringa leaf powder from Ghana and Nigeria. USDA/EU Organic. Not Novel Food in EU.
- [Dried Ginger](/products/ginger): Nigerian ginger with highest oleoresin (4-6%) and gingerol content globally.
- [Custom Sourcing](/products/custom-sourcing): We source any commodity from West Africa and India. Tiger nuts, kola nuts, African black soap, kaolin clay, and 50+ more products.

## Markets
- [Europe](/markets/europe): EU compliance expertise - EUDR, cadmium limits, EUR.1 certificates
- [Americas](/markets/americas): FDA compliance, SENASICA for Mexico, Caribbean markets
- [Middle East & Africa](/markets/middle-east): Hookah charcoal, sesame, hibiscus, shea butter for cosmetics
- [Asia & Pacific](/markets/asia): Raw cashew nuts for processing, cocoa for manufacturers

## Key Facts
- We ship to 150+ countries worldwide
- Teams on the ground in Accra (Ghana), Lagos (Nigeria), and across India
- Soil-to-door service: sourcing, QC, lab testing, export docs, freight, delivery
- Payment terms: LC, TT, CAD
- Incoterms: FOB, CIF, DDP

## Contact
- Website: https://origindirectgroup.com
- Email: info@origindirectgroup.com
- Quote requests: https://origindirectgroup.com/quote
